name: loop-dispatch
description: Single front door for a repo's automation loops so one routine per repo can handle every loop event instead of one routine per event. Routes the triggering GitHub event to the matching loop — ready-for-ai issue → mcp-issue-loop (cloud), auto-merge PR → merge-flow, PR review (changes requested) → rework-loop, auto-release issue → auto-release-loop — and falls back to a full sweep when event context isn't available. Router only; each loop owns its guardrails. Repo-agnostic; requires github-ops and the loop skills it routes to.
